I need to create a full-stack restaurant management application with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and NextAuth.

Plan:
1.  Initialize the project structure and create configuration files (1-4).
2.  Create core app layout and landing page (5-7).
3.  Create API routes (8-11).
4.  Create dashboard and management pages (12-14).
5.  Create auth pages (15-16).
6.  Create utility libraries (17-18).
7.  Create UI components (19-22).
8.  Create middleware and env template (23-24).

I will use `task_tracker` to manage this.
